prompt_text:
### Demographics: 38-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 86.4 kg; Height 183.7 cm; BMI 25.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 8.1%), FPG (12 months ago 201mg/dL; 9 months ago 182mg/dL; 6 months ago 201mg/dL; 3 months ago 204mg/dL; current 185mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 86.8kg; 9 months ago 85.1kg; 6 months ago 88.1kg; 3 months ago 85.3kg; current 86.4kg), Height (12 months ago 183.7cm; 9 months ago 183.7cm; 6 months ago 183.7cm; 3 months ago 183.7cm; current 183.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 121mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 70mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 30U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 12U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 18U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.4mg/dL; current 0.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 192mg/g; 9 months ago 269mg/g; 6 months ago 297mg/g; 3 months ago 318mg/g; current 326mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 36mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 38mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 121mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 133mg/dL; 3 months ago 136mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
